data.name: GORINP_DESC_SYSTEM_KEYBOARD
data.value: System keyboard device

data.name: GORINP_DESC_SYSTEM_MOUSE
data.value: System mouse device

data.name: GORINP_ERR_CANNOT_CREATE_INPUT_WINDOW
data.value: The input message window could not be created.

data.name: GORINP_ERR_CANNOT_REGISTER_INPUT_WINDOW
data.value: Cannot register the input window class.

data.name: GORINP_ERR_DRIVER_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The gaming device driver '{0}' was not found.

data.name: GORINP_ERR_INVALID_OS
data.value: The Gorgon Windows Input interface requires Windows 10 or better.

data.name: GORINP_ERR_INVALID_PATH
data.value: The path '{0}' is not valid.

data.name: GORINP_ERR_INVALID_WINDOW_HANDLE
data.value: The window handle is not valid.

data.name: GORINP_ERR_JOYSTICK_AXES_INVALID
data.value: There is no gaming device axis at the specified index.

data.name: GORINP_ERR_JOYSTICK_MOTOR_NOT_FOUND
data.value: There is no motor at index [{0}].

data.name: GORINP_ERR_WIN32_CANNOT_GET_WAIT_HANDLE
data.value: Unable to acquire the wait handle.

data.name: GORINP_ERR_WIN32_CURSOR_INFO
data.value:
There was an error retrieving the cursor information.
Win32 Error Code: {0}

data.name: GORINP_PRODUCT_XBOX_360
data.value: XBox 360 Controller

data.name: GORINP_PRODUCT_XBOX_360_WIRELESS
data.value: XBox 360 Wireless Controller

data.name: GORINP_PRODUCT_XBOX_ONE
data.value: XBox One Controller

data.name: GORINP_PRODUCT_XBOX_ONE_ELITE
data.value: XBox One Elite Controller

data.name: GORINP_PRODUCT_XBOX_ONE_ELITE_2
data.value: XBox One Elite 2 Controller

data.name: GORINP_PRODUCT_XBOX_ONE_S
data.value: XBox One S Controller

data.name: GORINP_PRODUCT_XBOX_SERIES_X
data.value: XBox Series X Controller

data.name: GORINP_RAW_DESC_SYS_KEYBOARD
data.value: System keyboard

data.name: GORINP_RAW_DESC_SYS_MOUSE
data.value: System mouse

data.name: GORINP_RAW_ERR_BUFFER_TOO_SMALL
data.value: The buffer returned was too small.

data.name: GORINP_RAW_ERR_CANNOT_ENUMERATE_WIN32_ERR
data.value: Unable to enumerate the raw input devices.

data.name: GORINP_RAW_ERR_CANNOT_READ_DEVICE_DATA
data.value: Could not read the raw input device data.

data.name: GORINP_RAW_ERR_CANNOT_REGISTER
data.value: Could not register the raw input device.

data.name: GORINP_RAW_ERR_HID_PREPARSED_INVALID
data.value: The preparsed data from the input device is invalid.

data.name: GORINP_RAW_ERR_INVALID_DEVICE_INFO_TYPE
data.value: The type '{0}' is not valid for use with this type '{1}'.

data.name: GORINP_RAW_ERR_UNKNOWN_DEVICE_TYPE
data.value: The device type '{0}' is unknown.

data.name: GORINP_TOSTR_JOYSTICKAXIS
data.value: Joystick axis: {0}, Range: {1} - {2}.

data.name: GORINP_WIN32_CANNOT_GET_HID_DATA
data.value: There was an error retrieving the HID information for device handle {0}.

data.name: GORINP_WIN32_CANNOT_GET_IO_DATA
data.value: There was an error retrieving the IO data for the device.

data.name: GORINP_WIN32_CANNOT_RETRIEVE_MANUFACTURER_DATA
data.value: There was an error retrieving the manufacturer data for the device.

data.name: GORINP_WIN32_CANNOT_RETRIEVE_PRODUCT_DATA
data.value: There was an error retrieving the product name of the device.

data.name: GORINP_WIN32_INVALID_DEVICE_HANDLE
data.value: The device handle is not valid.
